data.description: A bolt of magical force streaks toward a target you can see within range and strikes it. On a failed Wisdom saving throw, the target takes 1d6 force damage. The spell then darts to the next target, which must also make a Wisdom saving throw, taking 1d6 force damage on a failure. The spell continues to hop from target to target in this way up to three times or until it strikes an unwilling target (which can succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw to end the spell).
A vial containing the essence of a creature.
